notes: Solid implementation with good fundamentals: HTML entity sanitization, input validation with regex, Helmet, CORS, HTTP + WS rate limiting, graceful shutdown. However: no WebSocket origin verification (missing verifyClient), no maxPayload on WSS (default 100MB), no connection/room count limits (resource exhaustion vector), no WS ping/pong heartbeat for detecting dead connections, CORS defaults to '*'. Best practices are good (clean architecture, JSDoc, handler map pattern) but addMessageToHistory sorts O(n log n) on every insert despite chronological appends, and room-listing logic is duplicated between REST and WS handlers. Error handling is thorough with try/catch around handlers and JSON parsing, Express error middleware, and startup config validation, though ws.send() could still throw in edge cases despite readyState checks.
